name: freecad_parametric
tests_note: pytest 5/5 local; E2E webhook generate -> 3/3 variants accepted (capsule)
notes: FreeCAD is not present on the Hetzner host or in container; parametric generation is implemented on top of trimesh primitives (box/cylinder/capsule/sphere). STEP export is unavailable in this fallback path; STL + GLB are produced. Three jury checks (robustness, dimensional, export_quality) plus aggregate verdict are computed in-process.
